top_signals.title: Stocks Rise, Oil Slides After Trump Inks Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stocks rebounded and oil prices fell as some energy shipments began to transit the Strait of Hormuz, hours after President Donald Trump signed a preliminary deal to end the war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Iran sign deal as Trump vows to release frozen funds and ease sanctions
top_signals.summary: President says Iranians will receive incentives when they ‘behave’ and acknowledges Tehran will keep ballistic missiles
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wave of Persian Gulf oil set to leave Asian refiners swamped
top_signals.summary: The situation is a stark reversal from the early stages of the Iran war, when prices were spiking and the oil market was warning of dramatic shortages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Chase cuts off Anthropic access for its Hong Kong staff
top_signals.summary: Bank follows Goldman Sachs in preventing use of Claude in Asian financial hub
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rio Tinto’s copper mine blocked: protesters halt Oyu Tolgoi exports
top_signals.summary: Demonstrators halted concentrate shipments as calls grow for a larger share of mining wealth in the resource-rich nation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hudbay Minerals breaks ground at Copper Mountain mine expansion
top_signals.summary: The New Ingerbelle expansion is expected to extend the life of the Copper Mountain Mine beyond 2040.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: 38% back parliament’s proposal on imperial family: poll
top_signals.summary: The government and the ruling coalition aim to enact the revision during the current parliamentary session ending July 17.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korean lawmakers launch probe into ballot paper shortages
top_signals.summary: Dozens of polling stations experienced unprecedented ballot paper shortages on June 3 for the first nationwide vote since President Lee Jae Myung took office a year ago.
